name: Center
goal: Horizontally-centered max-width content column with intrinsic inline gutters — the article container primitive.
description: Wraps content in a max-width block centered with margin-inline:auto and inline padding (gutter). Supports four width presets in ch units and an intrinsic mode that also centers block-direction children via flex column.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum content width. prose=65ch, narrow=42ch, wide=80ch, full=100%.

props.name: gutter
props.description: Inline padding size. s=--ce-space-3 (12px), m=--ce-space-4 (16px), l=--ce-space-5 (24px).

props.name: intrinsic
props.description: When set, children are also centered (flex column + align-items:center). Without it, only the box is centered; children flow normally.

slots.description: Content to be centered. Any HTML — headings, paragraphs, nested components.

a11y.notes: Purely presentational layout wrapper. No semantic role added. Children retain their own semantics. Slot content is streaming-safe — the slot reads light-DOM children on each update, not only at connectedCallback.
